pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a release compatible with Java 11 features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not fully support or correctly handle the 'release' flag or Java 11 bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch compiler configuration from source/target to release flag for Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to compile for Java 11+ and ensures API leakage prevention; source/target 1.8 is incorrect for a Java 11 target.
